2604.24832.title: On the Trainability of Masked Diffusion Language Models via Blockwise Locality
2604.24832.paper_summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to standard autoregressive large language models (AR-LLMs), yet their optimization can be substantially less stable. We study blockwise MDMs and compare them with AR-LLMs on three controlled tasks that stress different aspects of structured generation: in-context linear regression, graph path-finding, and Sudoku solving. We find that standard random-masking MDMs fail to reliably learn linear regression, exhibit high variance training dynamics on graph path-finding, while outperforming AR-LLMs on Sudoku. To mitigate these instabilities, we propose two locality aware blockwise models, namely Jigsaw and Scatter, that inject left-to-right inductive bias by enforcing autoregressive locality within blocks while preserving iterative refinement at the block level. Empirically, Jigsaw matches AR-LLM stability on linear regression and remains strong on Sudoku, while Scatter retains diffusion's planning advantage on path-finding. Our results indicate that standard random-masking MDMs, even with blockwise variants, may be a suboptimal instantiation of diffusion LMs for ordered generation, motivating models beyond random masking.
2604.24832.paper_summary_zh: 被遮蔽的擴散語言模型（MDMs）最近作為標準自回歸大型語言模型（AR-LLMs）的有希望替代方案出現，但其優化的穩定性可能大幅降低。我們研究了區塊式 MDMs，並將其與 AR-LLMs 在三個控制任務上進行比較，這些任務強調結構化生成的不同方面：上下文線性回歸、圖形路徑尋找和數獨解題。我們發現標準隨機遮蔽的 MDMs 無法可靠地學習線性回歸，在圖形路徑尋找中表現出高變異的訓練動態，而在數獨上則超越了 AR-LLMs。為了減輕這些不穩定性，我們提出了兩個考慮局部性的區塊式模型，即 Jigsaw 和 Scatter，這些模型通過在區塊內強制自回歸局部性來注入從左到右的歸納偏差，同時保持區塊層級的迭代精煉。實證結果表明，Jigsaw 在線性回歸上與 AR-LLM 的穩定性相匹配，並在數獨上保持強勁，而 Scatter 則在路徑尋找中保留了擴散的規劃優勢。我們的結果表明，標準隨機遮蔽的 MDMs，即使有區塊式變體，對於有序生成可能是擴散 LMs 的次優實例，這促使我們尋求超越隨機遮蔽的模型。
2604.24832.author: Yuxiang Wang et.al.
2604.24832.authors: Yuxiang Wang, Yu Xiang, Baojian Zhou, Qifang Zhao, Keyue Jiang, Yanghua Xiao, Xiaoxiao Xu
